title: TCW Launcher 0.3.7 Beta
summary: Community manager theme/profile-picture controls, duplicate profile cleanup, separate radio volume, audio cache cleanup, and live backend endpoint fixes.
notes: Adds manager-side theme editing, folder upload support, live/inactive theme controls, and approved profile-picture uploads.
Stops duplicate public profile cards when loading more profiles on the website.
Adds separate Holonet radio volume and removes deleted backend audio files from each launcher cache.
Keeps backend-powered server status, community news, events, audio, and Steam-linked profiles online.
